name: Farm Land And Harvest Game
description: Farm Land And Harvest game teach you how to grow and harvest wheat. You can choose any part to enjoy. If you play in order, you can learn the whole process of planting and harvesting. First, assemble the truck you need and start clearing the wasteland. Then plant the seeds into the soil. After you water the soil, the wheat will grow. Want to know what all needs to be done in this process? Come and play
tags: Boys, Car, Cooking, Cute, Educational, Girls, Kids, Simulation
